metadata.description: AI coding assistant skills for Vespa.ai

plugins.name: schema-authoring
plugins.description: Write and validate Vespa schema (.sd) files — field types, indexing, tensors, HNSW, structs, fieldsets

plugins.name: app-package
plugins.description: Scaffold Vespa application packages — directory layout, services.xml, embedders, deployment

plugins.name: query-builder
plugins.description: Build YQL queries and design rank profiles — operators, grouping, 3-phase ranking, ML models

plugins.name: feed-operations
plugins.description: Document CRUD and bulk feeding — document JSON, partial updates, vespa feed CLI, conditional writes

plugins.name: vespa-cli
plugins.description: Vespa CLI for deploying, managing, and debugging applications — targets, auth, deployment lifecycle, logs, CI/CD

plugins.name: pyvespa
plugins.description: Python API for Vespa.ai — define schemas, deploy applications, feed documents, query, and manage Vespa from Python
